mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM MCP_USER_PROMOTION A WHERE 1=1 AND USERID = #{userId}

SELECT ncd.DTL_CD_NM, mup.CRET_DT, mup.PRIZE_YN, mup.PRIZE_NM, mup.RSLT_ANDT FROM MCP_USER_PROMOTION mup, NMCP_CD_DTL ncd WHERE 1=1 AND mup.PROMOTION_CODE = ncd.DTL_CD AND ncd.CD_GROUP_ID = 'UserPromotion' AND mup.USERID = #{userId} ORDER BY mup.CRET_DT DESC
